productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes Red Tshirts
description: Composition Polo neck T-shirt made of wide red and navy blue panels composed of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, concealed buttoned chest placket, appliqued and printed brand detailing on the upper left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wide red and navy blue panels lend a preppy feel to this black polo neck T-shirt from status quo. The appliqued brand seal over the printed brand detailing on the upper left chest enhances the brand image. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
